gigapan.description:
I should in theory know 'better' but I am a sucker for the Maker Shed.  So many different things which appeal to me.

On the plus side, even looking back several years, I am not unhappy with my purchases.  I have resisted the 'over the 
top' toys and managed to mostly get things which I like...

Like lots of blinky things and programmable hardware :-)
